description:
Dolt backend support implemented. Ready for testing/review.

## Changes Made

### 1. Added MySQL dependency (server/Cargo.toml)
- Added mysql = "25" crate for Dolt/MySQL connectivity

### 2. Created dolt module (server/src/dolt.rs)
- DoltConfig struct for connection settings
- BackendType enum (Jsonl, Dolt)
- detect_backend() - reads .beads/config.yaml to detect backend
- connect() - creates MySQL connection pool
- load_beads_from_dolt() - queries issues, dependencies, comments tables

### 3. Updated beads route (server/src/routes/beads.rs)
- Added dolt integration with backend detection
- Falls back to JSONL for backward compatibility

### 4. Updated main.rs
- Added mod dolt; import

## Status: Code compiles, ready for testing
title: update for dolt
